title: PM Org Seed-Data Population From V1 Supabase Sources
objective: Populate the bounded org shared-infra tables in staging from read-only V1 Supabase sources, preserve V1 client and site UUIDs, create business-unit lookup rows, and verify zero orphaned PM/work org references without activating PM/work foreign keys, modifying PM/work SQL, or implementing runtime code.
required_inputs: Read-only access to V1 Supabase public.clients, public.sites, and public.projects
Staging database with validated org schema bundle already applied
constrained_outputs: A population handoff note under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/ops/agents/handoffs/
Row-count and coverage evidence for org.clients, org.sites, org.business_units, and org.contracts
Coverage verification results proving whether PM/work org references are fully seeded
No PM/work FK activation DDL, no PM/work SQL changes, no runtime implementation
validation_steps: Confirm population preserves V1 client_id and site_id UUIDs where they already exist in V1 sources and only creates the minimum org rows required by packet 011a
Confirm distinct V1 business_unit text values are mapped into org.business_units rows with explicit coverage results, while org.contracts remains empty unless real source-backed data exists
Confirm the four coverage verification queries from packet 011a are executed and their results are recorded without activating PM/work foreign keys or modifying PM/work SQL
Confirm packet 011c does not implement runtime code and leaves the system ready for later FK-activation planning if seed coverage is complete
sql_permission_note: Packet 011c authorizes bounded staging DML into org.clients, org.sites, org.business_units, and org.contracts using read-only V1 source inputs. It does not authorize PM/work FK activation, PM/work SQL changes, or runtime implementation.
